name: Ecocera Optronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ecocera Optronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ceramics circuit boards in Taiwan. It offers direct plating copper products consisting high-power LED thermal dissipation substrates, LED thermal dissipation modules, concentrating type solar cell substrates, passive components, high power electronic components, etc. The company also provides direct bonded copper and high performance copper products. Its products are used in LED lighting, automotive lighting, mobile phone LED flash, UV, display, and other applications. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
